calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:39am and concluding at 9:50am.

Plaintiff connect By American Family appearing represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Clarissa Lashea Lockett not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and Claims Senior Adjuster DAWN SCHOENWETTER and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Connect By American Family, and against Defendant Clarissa Lashea Lockett, as follows:

Damages: $56,529.67
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $619.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $57,148.67

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
